# host_locale (Resource)

Manages the system locale `LANG` value.

This resource uses `localectl` and is intended for Linux hosts with systemd. Destroying the resource removes it from Terraform state and leaves the live locale unchanged.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_locale" "default" {
  lang = "en_US.UTF-8"
}
```

## Import

Import the current locale by LANG value:

```shell
terraform import host_locale.default en_US.UTF-8
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `lang` (String) System locale LANG value, such as `en_US.UTF-8`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `lang`.
